package rulecoverage

func NegativeLogPrintfForProduction() string {
    ruleID := "log_printf_for_production"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`log.Printf` (stdlib) usage in web service handler code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
